# Trakt

Content source backed by [Trakt](https://trakt.tv). Can follow watchlists, user lists,
collections, and the site's trending and popular feeds, which makes it useful both for
"everything I've marked to watch" and for open-ended discovery.

Only `clientid` is required — that is enough for public lists and the trending/popular
feeds. Personal watchlists and collections additionally need the OAuth settings, since
those endpoints are per-user.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs` from each plugin's `settings_schema()`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Services

### Events

Subscribes to:

- `riven.content-service.requested`

### Settings

Set via environment variables prefixed with `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__`, or in the settings UI.

| Setting | Environment variable | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `clientid` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__clientid` | secret | Yes | — | — |
| `accesstoken` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__accesstoken` | secret | No | — | — |
| `watchlist` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__watchlist` | boolean | No | `false` | — |
| `userlists` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__userlists` | text | No | — | Comma-separated Trakt list slugs. |
| `fetchtrending` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__fetchtrending` | boolean | No | `false` | — |
| `trendingcount` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__trendingcount` | number | No | `10` | — |
| `fetchpopular` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__fetchpopular` | boolean | No | `false` | — |
| `popularcount` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__popularcount` | number | No | `10` | — |
| `fetchwatched` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__fetchwatched` | boolean | No | `false` | — |
| `watchedcount` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__watchedcount` | number | No | `10` | — |
| `watchedperiod` | `RIVEN_PLUGIN_SETTING__TRAKT__watchedperiod` | text | No | `weekly` | Period for watched history (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly, all). |
<!-- END GENERATED -->
